characters.appearance: A human right hand with a light complexion. Neatly trimmed nails, visible from the wrist up. Used solely for interacting with the screen.
characters.demeanor: Functional and deliberate, performing tapping and scrolling gestures.

scenes.supernova_script:
Unknown speaker says: English बोलना शुरू करने का सबसे आसान तरीका है रोज़ practice करना — और Supernova के साथ ये बहुत simple है। [The easiest way to start speaking English is daily practice — and with Supernova, it's very simple.]
Unknown speaker says: Experts कहते हैं कि जो लोग रोज़ 10-15 मिनट बोलकर practice करते हैं, उनका confidence बहुत तेज़ी से बढ़ता है। [Experts say that people who practice speaking for 10-15 minutes daily build their confidence much faster.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by presenting daily practice as the easiest way to learn.
- Establishes the core commitment (10-15 minutes a day).
- Sets a warm, encouraging tone while introducing Supernova as the solution.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Supernova के साथ अपनी English speaking skills को next level पर ले जाएँ। (Take your English speaking skills to the next level with Supernova.)
English बोलना शुरू करने का सबसे आसान तरीका है रोज़ practice करना — और Supernova के साथ ये बहुत simple है। (The easiest way to start speaking English is daily practice — and with Supernova, it's very simple.)
रोज़ 10-15 मिनट बोलकर practice करने से confidence बहुत तेज़ी से बढ़ता है। (Practicing speaking for 10-15 minutes daily builds confidence much faster.)

scenes.supernova_script:
Unknown speaker says: Supernova इतना effective क्यों है? क्योंकि यहाँ आप रटते नहीं, बल्कि real life English सीखते हैं — natural phrases और ऐसे words जो रोज़ काम आते हैं। [Why is Supernova so effective? Because here you don't memorize, you learn real life English — natural phrases and words that are useful daily.]
Unknown speaker says: Supernova के साथ सब कुछ आसान हो जाता है: आपको मिलते हैं daily lessons और Hindi-to-English translations, ताकि आप बिना अटके समझ सकें। [With Supernova, everything becomes easy: you get daily lessons and Hindi-to-English translations, so you can understand without getting stuck.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Explains the methodology behind the app (real-life English vs. rote memorization).
- Highlights key features like daily lessons and Hindi-to-English translations.
- Reassures the user that the learning process is frictionless.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Supernova इतना effective क्यों है? क्योंकि यहाँ आप रटते नहीं, बल्कि real life English सीखते हैं। (Why is Supernova so effective? Because here you don't memorize, you learn real life English.)
Supernova के साथ सब कुछ आसान हो जाता है: आपको मिलते हैं daily lessons और Hindi-to-English translations, ताकि आप बिना अटके समझ सकें। (With Supernova, everything becomes easy: you get daily lessons and Hindi-to-English translations, so you can understand without getting stuck.)

scenes.supernova_script:
Unknown speaker says: आप अपनी ज़रूरत के हिसाब से situations चुन सकते हैं — job interview, office meeting, shopping, या दोस्तों से बातचीत। [You can choose situations according to your need — job interview, office meeting, shopping, or talking with friends.]
Unknown speaker says: और अगर आप अपनी झिझक दूर करना चाहते हैं, तो आप सीधा बात कर सकते हैं... [And if you want to overcome your hesitation, you can directly talk...]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Showcases the practical, real-world application of the app.
- Lists relatable scenarios (interviews, shopping) that resonate with the target audience's daily struggles.
- Builds anticipation for the AI Tutor feature reveal.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
अपनी ज़रूरत के हिसाब से situations चुनें — job interview, office meeting, shopping, या दोस्तों से बातचीत। (Choose situations according to your need — job interview, office meeting, shopping, or talking with friends.)
और अगर आप अपनी झिझक दूर करना चाहते हैं, तो आप सीधा बात कर सकते हैं... (And if you want to overcome your hesitation, you can directly talk...)

scenes.supernova_script:
Unknown speaker says: हमारे AI Tutor के साथ। बिना किसी डर के English में बात कीजिये। [with our AI Tutor. Speak in English without any fear.]
Unknown speaker says: दिन के सिर्फ 10-15 मिनट काफी हैं असली progress देखने के लिए। [Just 10-15 minutes a day are enough to see real progress.]
Unknown speaker says: धीरे-धीरे, Supernova आपको सिर्फ English पढ़ना नहीं, बल्कि English में सोचना और बोलना सिखाता है। [Little by little, Supernova teaches you not just to read English, but to think and speak in English.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Reveals the AI Tutor as a safe, judgment-free practice space.
- Reiterates the low time commitment (10-15 mins) for high reward.
- Ends on an empowering note: shifting from just studying to actually thinking and speaking in English.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
हमारे AI Tutor के साथ। बिना किसी डर के English में बात कीजिये। (with our AI Tutor. Speak in English without any fear.)
दिन के सिर्फ 10-15 मिनट काफी हैं असली progress देखने के लिए। (Just 10-15 minutes a day are enough to see real progress.)
धीरे-धीरे, Supernova आपको सिर्फ English पढ़ना नहीं, बल्कि English में सोचना और बोलना सिखाता है। (Little by little, Supernova teaches you not just to read English, but to think and speak in English.)
